headline: A Look At Raymond James Financial (RJF) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: How Raymond James Financial’s recent returns frame the current setup Raymond James Financial (RJF) has caught investor attention after a recent stretch where the share price shows a 7.3% decline over the past month and a 12.8% decline over the past 3 months. Those moves come against a backdrop of annual revenue of US$14.2b and net income of US$2.09b. Both revenue and earnings show annual growth figures in the mid 6% range based on the latest reported period. See our latest analysis for...
